page_header.label: COMMUNITY
page_header.title: Join the Ecosystem
page_header.description: Connect with privacy advocates, developers, and users building the future of confidential payments.

items.title: Twitter/X
items.description: Follow us for updates, news, and privacy insights from the ZKIRA team and community.

items.title: Discord
items.description: Join real-time discussions with developers, get technical support, and collaborate on privacy solutions.

items.title: Telegram
items.description: Connect with the community in our public Telegram group for casual conversations and announcements.

items.title: GitHub
items.description: Explore our open-source code, contribute to development, and report issues or suggest improvements.

items.title: Understanding Stealth Addresses: Privacy Without Mixing
items.description: A deep dive into how ZKIRA's stealth address implementation provides privacy without the regulatory concerns of mixing protocols.

items.title: Building Privacy Infrastructure for Solana
items.description: The technical challenges and solutions behind creating confidential payment infrastructure on a transparent blockchain.

items.title: Why Financial Privacy Matters in Web3
items.description: Exploring the importance of transaction privacy for individuals, businesses, and the broader crypto ecosystem.

sections.title: Contribute to ZKIRA
sections.subtitle: ZKIRA is open source and community-driven. Whether you're a developer, designer, researcher, or privacy advocate, there are many ways to contribute to building better privacy infrastructure for everyone.

items.title: Code
items.description: Contribute to smart contracts, SDK, or frontend development

items.title: Documentation
items.description: Help improve guides, tutorials, and technical documentation

items.title: Research
items.description: Contribute to cryptographic research and protocol improvements
